title: STD CLINIC - 211info
text: GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT STD CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides STI testing and treatment, STD/HIV risk counseling, treatment for sexual partners, STD monitoring, case investigation, control, and prevention. 528 E Main Street Suite E John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 575-0429 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 575-0429 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Sliding scale fee DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Grant County Services: AIDS/HIV Clinics AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Safe Sex Supplies Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - VITAL RECORDS GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT RURAL HEALTH CLINIC HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PUBLIC HEALTH MODERNIZATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INFORMATION SERVICES - TOBACCO PREVENTION AND EDUCATION PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
